hook.description: 3-second pattern interrupt hook, localized to Malaysian SME pain points

examples.English: SME loan rejection rate naik 30% in 2026! 😱
examples.BM: Kadar tolak pinjaman SME naik 30% tahun ini! 😱
examples.Manglish: SME loan rejected? Jangan give up, Finworld sini nak tolong! 💪

body.description: 150-200 word localized copy, Malaysian context only
required_elements: Mention PDPA compliance for financial data
Local examples: SME Corp Malaysia, MDEC grants, Malaysian financial institutions
Pain points: High interest rates, slow approval, paperwork, compliance

cta.description: Clear call to action with WhatsApp link
cta.example: WhatsApp us now: +6012-345 6789 for free consultation!

image_prompt_template.structure: [Subject: Malaysian SME owner/financial advisor] + [Context: KL/Malaysia skyline, office setting] + [Action: reviewing loan documents, using WhatsApp chatbot] + [Style: Professional, warm, localized]
image_prompt_template.example: Malaysian Chinese SME owner in Kuala Lumpur office reviewing SME loan documents on laptop, Finworld Solution logo on desk, WhatsApp chatbot interface open on phone, warm natural lighting, 2048x2048

example_30s.Z-Image Prompt: Worried SME owner holding rejected loan letter, KL background
example_30s.Video Motion Prompt: Slow zoom in on rejected letter, shake head slowly

example_30s.Audio Script: Finworld Solution boleh bantu with 24/7 WhatsApp chatbot
example_30s.Z-Image Prompt: Finworld logo on phone screen, WhatsApp chat interface
example_30s.Video Motion Prompt: Finger typing on phone, chat messages appearing

example_30s.Z-Image Prompt: Happy SME owner shaking hands with Finworld advisor
example_30s.Video Motion Prompt: Handshake, smile, logo animation at end

compliance_notes: Include PDPA compliance statement for financial data handling
Avoid misleading claims about loan approval rates (follow Malaysian financial advertising guidelines)
Mention Bank Negara Malaysia (BNM) compliance where relevant

Instagram.format: Reels (9:16) or Feed (1:1) with image carousel
